description_long: This is a white athletic shoe with a low-cut profile, featuring a prominent pink logo and branding on the side. The upper is constructed from synthetic leather and mesh, providing both durability and breathability. The shoe has a standard criss-cross lacing system with white laces and a padded tongue for comfort. The midsole appears to be made of lightweight foam, while the outsole is rubber with a textured tread for traction. Subtle design accents include a small Italian flag detail and sculpted heel support. The overall appearance is clean and modern, suitable for sports or casual urban wear.
description: A white low-cut athletic shoe with pink branding, standard laces, and a textured rubber sole, designed for comfort and urban activity.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, white laces, and padded tongue.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large pink logo, sculpted midsole, and small Italian flag detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel support structure and laces tied at the back.
description_view_3: Right side view with 'DIADORA' branding in pink and visible mesh paneling.
attribute_logo: Pink stylized 'Diadora' logo on the side and heel, small Italian flag detail near the heel.
